source_meta.source_document: VA-LCP Proximal Tibial Plate 3.5 Surgical Technique

systems.system_notes: Proximal tibial plateau locking plate system within the DePuy Synthes trauma portfolio, including variable-angle proximal tibia fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes technique and catalog materials describe dedicated proximal tibia plating instrumentation for tibial plateau fixation.

components.component_notes: Official technique and inventory materials describe the proximal tibia plate family used for tibial plateau fixation.
Official inventory control materials describe compatible locking screw fixation for the proximal tibia plate family.
Official technique materials describe dedicated instrumentation and drill-guide workflow for proximal tibia plate application.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources confirm the proximal tibia plate family, instrument set, and inventory form, but a full normalized product-code matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper sterile implant listing or broader parts-matrix pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
